/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmvgal_vulkan_layer.so -o libmvgal_vulkan_layer.so CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/intercept/vulkan/vk_layer.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/intercept/vulkan/vk_instance.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/intercept/vulkan/vk_device.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/intercept/vulkan/vk_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_vulkan_layer.dir/intercept/vulkan/vk_command.c.o  libmvgal_core.a /lib64/libvulkan.so -lm
